barRaise.topFinding: Twenty-four hours since the prior bar-raise. Two patches shipped (v0.74.47 wired the new lowpoly Command Center + enemymesh_runner_v1 FBX into the Skirmish art-preview path; v0.75.0 ported the sibling project's asset-tracker UI surface as a MINOR). v0.74.47 is the first concrete forward motion on the M3 art dependency in the prior bar-raise's window. But every single one of yesterday's nine HIGH and MEDIUM actions is still open. The dual-path constants remain divergent, all eight multimesh flags remain off, project.godot config/version has fallen another five patches behind (now 0.74.38 vs GDD 0.75.0), and the canonical-audit schedule has now missed a third consecutive day. The project is moving, but its structural debt is not, and the audit loop that would catch this is itself silent. Lift one HIGH this week or the at-risk verdict calcifies.
